expectations.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors
expectations.evidence: All access via exported selector hooks: useNotifications(), useNotificationCount(), useNotificationActions(). useShallow for multi-field actions. No bare useNotificationStore().

expectations.text: Stats data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
expectations.evidence: useStats() hook uses useQuery with statsKeys. 2 useQuery occurrences.

expectations.text: Active tab state from URL/router params, not useState/Zustand
expectations.evidence: useDashboardTab() reads/writes ?tab= via useSearchParams. Default tab omits param for clean URL.

expectations.text: Notification state in Zustand store (global UI state)
expectations.evidence: useNotificationStore manages toasts. devtools middleware. Separate from server data.
initialState extracted, reset() action restores it.

expectations.text: Three-way state colocation: stats in TQ, tabs in URL, notifications in Zustand
expectations.evidence: Stats via useQuery (server data). Tabs via useSearchParams (URL state). Notifications via Zustand (global UI). Perfect colocation per the skill's decision tree.

expectations.text: Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern

expectations.evidence: 28 data-testid occurrences on tabs, buttons, checkboxes, toast dismissals, stat cards.
